obligations.claim: payload_byte_count and ctx_payload_byte_count reflect the accepted 17-byte payload in the SRAM pack transaction.
SRAM write emits the accepted payload bytes with a contiguous byte strobe and no holes.
SRAM ready/valid backpressure evidence observes ready and proves write payload hold until acceptance.
Descriptor publication is ordered after SRAM flush and exposes the final payload byte length.
APB Q_PAYLOAD_COUNT reads the updated per-Q payload count after payload assembly visibility.
